___comment___: English translations for Seafile MFT. Keys are Chinese source text.
请使用 LDAP 账号登录: Please log in with your LDAP account
任务当前状态为「{status}」，无法重复审批: Task is currently «{status}» and cannot be reviewed again
文件不存在或尚未通过审批: File does not exist or has not been approved
无权下载此文件: No permission to download this file
您拥有 审核权限，可以在「待审核列表」中处理申请。: You have review permission. You can process submissions in the "Pending Review" list.
，可以在「待审核列表」中处理申请。: , and can process submissions in the "Pending Review" list.
通过审批后，系统会自动将文件同步到外网 Seafile。: After approval, files are automatically synced to the external Seafile.
您也可以上传文件并发起审核申请（自己的申请需他人审核）。: You can also upload files and submit review requests (your own submissions require review by others).
点击「上传文件」可直接通过 Web 界面上传文件到内网，系统自动发起审核申请。: Click "Upload File" to upload files to the internal Seafile via the web interface. A review request will be created automatically.
在「我的申请」中可查看申请状态，审核完成后会通过邮件通知您。: Check "My Submissions" for the status of your requests. You will be notified by email once reviewed.
申请通过后，文件将自动同步到外网，可在「下载文件」页面下载。: After approval, files are synced to the external Seafile and can be downloaded from the "Download Files" page.
上传成功后，系统将自动创建审核申请并通知审核人员。审核通过后文件会自动同步至外网: Upon successful upload, a review request will be created and reviewers will be notified. Approved files are synced to the external Seafile automatically.
目标路径（外网 Seafile 目录，留空默认根目录）: Target Path (external Seafile directory, defaults to root)
点击选择文件，或将文件拖到这里: Click to select a file, or drag and drop here
支持任意格式，单次上传一个文件: Any file format supported, one file per upload
Brief description of the file purpose...
✅ 文件已上传，审核申请 #{task_id} 已提交，审核完成后将通知您。: ✅ File uploaded. Review request #{task_id} submitted. You will be notified after review.
内网 → 外网 Seafile 文件发布审核: Internal → External Seafile File Publishing Review
💡 您通过邮件链接进行「通过」/「拒绝」操作，请填写审批信息后提交。: 💡 You are reviewing via the email link. Please fill in the review info and submit.
Please explain the reason for rejection...
Seafile 内外网文件审核同步系统: Seafile Internal-External File Review & Sync System
✅ 已通过审批！文件正在同步至外网 Seafile，完成后将通知上传者。: ✅ Approved! File is syncing to the external Seafile. The uploader will be notified once complete.
✅ Task #{id} approved. File syncing to external...
以下文件已通过审批并同步至外网，可直接下载。: The following files have been approved and synced to the external Seafile. Ready for download.
手动创建本地账号（密码登录），适用于未接入 LDAP 的用户。LDAP 用户首次: Manually create local accounts (password login) for users without LDAP access. LDAP users are auto-created on first login.
暂无用户，请通过 LDAP 登录或在上方创建本地账号。: No users yet. Please log in via LDAP or create a local account above.
不能删除当前登录的账号: Cannot delete the currently logged-in account
该账号通过 LDAP 认证: This account is authenticated via LDAP
LDAP 用户的密码需要在 LDAP 服务器上修改，无法通过此系统更改。: LDAP user passwords must be changed on the LDAP server and cannot be modified through this system.
请输入旧密码和新密码完成修改。修改成功后需使用新密码重新登录。: Please enter your old and new passwords. You will need to log in again with the new password after changing.
新密码长度不能少于4位: New password must be at least 4 characters
该账号通过 LDAP 认证，无法在此修改密码: This account is authenticated via LDAP. Password cannot be changed here.
该账号通过 LDAP 认证，无法重置密码: This account is authenticated via LDAP. Password cannot be reset.
该账号通过 Seafile 认证，无法在此修改密码: This account is authenticated via Seafile. Password cannot be changed here.
该账号通过 Seafile 认证，无法重置密码: This account is authenticated via Seafile. Password cannot be reset.
该账号通过 Seafile 认证: This account is authenticated via Seafile
Seafile 用户的密码需要在 Seafile 系统中修改，无法通过此系统更改: Seafile user passwords must be changed in the Seafile system and cannot be modified through this system.
请使用本地账号登录: Please log in with your local account
请使用 Seafile 账号登录: Please log in with your Seafile account
为用户: Set a new password for user
确定要删除用户: Are you sure you want to delete user
删除后无法恢复，该用户的所有会话将立即失效。: This action cannot be undone. All sessions for this user will be immediately invalidated.
内网文件上传，需要您审核后方可发布至外网: A file has been uploaded to the internal Seafile and requires your review before publishing to the external network.
请点击下方按钮进行审批，或进入详情页查看文件后再决定：: Please click a button below to review, or view file details first:
⏰ 此审批链接将于 {expire_time} UTC 过期: ⏰ This review link expires at {expire_time} UTC
此邮件由 Seafile 文件审核系统自动发送，请勿回复。: This email was sent automatically by the Seafile File Review System. Please do not reply.
您上传的文件审批结果通知: Review Result for Your Uploaded File
填写一个配对名称，系统会在内网与外网 Seafile 各确保存在一个同名仓库（不: Enter a pair name; the system ensures a repo with the same name exists on both the internal and external Seafile (auto-created if missing). A pair means: files in this internal repo, once approved, are automatically delivered to the corresponding external repo.
配对名称（同时作为内外网仓库名）: Pair Name (also used as internal & external repo name)
若您已在内网与外网 Seafile 分别建有现成的配对仓库，可在此直接填入两者的: If you already have pre-existing paired repos on the internal and external Seafile, enter both repo IDs here and the system will reuse them instead of auto-creating. Both IDs are required together; leave both empty to auto-create by name.
内网仓库 ID「{id}」不存在: Internal repo ID "{id}" does not exist
外网仓库 ID「{id}」不存在: External repo ID "{id}" does not exist
请同时填写内网与外网仓库 ID，或都留空由系统自动创建: Please fill in both internal and external repo IDs, or leave both empty to auto-create
配对「{name}」已创建，内外网仓库已就绪: Pair "{name}" created; internal & external repos are ready
确认删除该分组？成员与配对关联将一并清除。: Confirm deleting this group? Its members and repo-pair links will be removed too.
该分组可访问的配对仓库: Repo Pairs accessible to this group
分组成员（可多选，用户可属多个分组）: Group members (multi-select; a user may belong to multiple groups)
暂无配对仓库，请先到「配对仓库」创建: No repo pairs yet. Please create one under "Repo Pairs" first.
暂无分组，请先在上方创建分组。: No groups yet. Please create a group above first.
文件将上传到该配对的内网仓库，审批通过后自动同步至对应的外网仓库。: The file will be uploaded to this pair's internal repo, and synced to the corresponding external repo after approval.
您当前未被分配到任何仓库分组，无法上传文件。请联系管理员。: You are not assigned to any repo group and cannot upload files. Please contact the administrator.
请选择有效的目标仓库配对: Please select a valid target repo pair
